differentials.name: Fungal abscess: coccidioidomycosis, mucormycosis (in diabetics), aspergillosis, cryptococcus

context: Predisposed:   immunocompromised host (candida, aspergillus) √  enhancement of leptomeningeal surface √  nodular / ring-enhancing parenchymal lesion Cx:     Communicating hydrocephalus ← thick exudate blocks basal cisterns
